description: Grows self and others through mentorship, coordination, and leadership.

signals: Learns quickly, embraces feedback, and shows a growth mindset
Steps up when asked and seeks help appropriately
examples: Paired to learn a new build tool and applied the feedback
Asked clarifying questions and incorporated review comments

signals: Supports teammates with empathy and knowledge sharing
Onboards others and helps them understand scope
examples: Helped a new teammate set up local environments and explained workflows
Shared a short how-to on a React hook the team uses

signals: Actively mentors others with constructive feedback and reflection
Resolves conflicts with calm, logical reasoning
examples: Coached a peer on testing practices through review and pairing
Facilitated a conversation to align on design disagreements

signals: Coordinates team members to keep delivery smooth and focused
Moderates discussions and handles conflicts with empathy
examples: Reorganized tasks when a lead was out to keep a release on track
Led a design session ensuring all voices were heard

signals: Provides mentorship that accelerates others’ growth across the team
Shapes team culture and hiring standards
examples: Designed a structured onboarding plan adopted by the team
Interviewed and calibrated candidates to raise the bar

signals: Coordinates collaboration across multiple teams and stakeholders
Cultivates an environment of knowledge sharing at scale
examples: Organized a cross-team guild to spread best practices
Mentored several engineers toward Staff readiness

signals: Guides leaders and teams to flourish, setting goals and inspiring performance
Builds networks that strengthen the organization’s talent and culture
examples: Counseled multiple teams’ leads through major delivery milestones
Established a company-wide mentoring program with clear success metrics
